title: Vencier Set of 3 Resin Woven Storage Basket Box with Lid & Lock, White, Large, Medium, Small (White)
features: PREMIUM QUALITY - Premium quality hamper storage basket with hand woven resin on metal frame storage with insert handles - Ideal for Xmas Hamper Basket

SIZE – ( SMALL HAMPER STORAGE BASKET - W28cm X D20cm X H12.5cm ) , ( MEDIUM - HAMPER STORAGE BASKET W33cm X D24cm X H15.5cm) , (LARGE HAMPER STORAGE BASKET - W36cm X D28cm X H18.5cm Approx.). 100% satisfaction guarantee
BEST USE ALL OCCASION - Quality storage box ideal for storing kids toys, food storage, books, living room, bathroom etc.
STYLISH HAMPER STORAGE BOXES - The stylish hamper storage boxes mean that organising your belongings doesn’t have to be an unattractive feat, with a strong look strap and metal lock for that sleek.

MULTI-PURPOSE - Set of 3 multi-purposes Resin Storage Basket. Baskets are suitable for use in a variety of rooms in your home, securely storing anything from kid’s toys , books or bathroom toiletries. With three different sizes.
description: Product Description 3-Piece Set of Woven Storage Baskets Made with Resin | Vencier The Vencier Set of 3 Resin Woven Storage Baskets is the perfect storage solution for towels, toiletries, and other bathroom essentials that are found in homes across the world. They can be placed inside and outside any room, wherever you like! DON'T DISREGARD IT! USE IT ALL OVER THE HOME! This is just an example, you can use the baskets however you see fit for whatever purpose in your home whether it be to store beauty products, hand towels, or body towels after your shower or bath. AVAILABLE IN THREE SIZES These baskets are available in three sizes, so you can choose from them to suit your storage requirements. You can stack the baskets and use each to store different-sized items. CONSTRUCTED WITH HANDWOVEN RESIN They can withstand the condensation from a bath or shower and won't warp because they are made of solid, durable resin. They are the perfect addition to any room in the house, including the bathroom and bedroom Specification: Size: [Large: 18.5cm (H) x 36cm (W) x 28cm (D), ] [Medium: 15.5cm (H) x 33cm (W) x 24cm (D),] [Small: 12.5cm (H) x 28cm (W) x 20cm (D)] Material: Handwoven Resin In the box: 1 x Small Resin Basket, 1 x Medium Resin Basket, 1 x Large Resin Basket Our Own Images: All product images Vencier
